particle_size_range: nano- and microplastic particles (no specific bounds provided in excerpt)
key_metrics_output: exposure assessment, occurrence in drinking water, air, food, dermal exposure, dosimetry, biokinetics, toxicological effects, chemical vectors, pathogen vectors
abstract: WHO report assessing dietary and inhalation exposure to nano- and microplastic particles and their potential health implications. The document reviews occurrence of nano- and microplastics in drinking water, air, food, and dermal exposure pathways; examines dosimetry and biokinetics; evaluates toxicological effects; and considers nano- and microplastics as vectors for chemical and pathogenic exposure.

5.1 Literature review and experimental study evaluation
5.2 Nano- and microplastics as vectors of chemical exposure
